calendar.matters:
Notcie Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF BMW FINANCIAL SERVICES NA, LLC'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is denied. The levy is on funds held in a bank account and judgment debtor has not demonstrated the funds are from paid earnings. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =302/CK

Off Calendar Apr-29-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2011 Continued To May-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Brian Winn, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs BMW Fianancial Services NA, LLC,
Plaintiff's Witness: Jennie Livingston appeared by declaration.

Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Wai Cheuk for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $75,369.86
Prejudgment Interest - $16,623.25
Attorney's Fees - $2397.39
Costs - $480.00
Total judgment in the amount of $94,870.50

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
